modules.title: Welcome to clubSENsational
modules.subtitle: Who we are, our purpose and what makes clubSENsational distinctive.
modules.descriptor: Start with our story, mission, impact and partners before you open the teaching blocks.
modules.intro: Begin your induction with an overview of our organisation, values and the standards that guide everything we do.
points: Our brief story and founding context
outcomes: What clubSENsational stands for and why we exist
How our mission guides everyday decisions
The difference we make for clients and communities
Who our key partners and suppliers are

blocks.title: Our Story & Growth
blocks.hint: How clubSENsational began, grew, and why consistency and trust matter.

blocks.title: Our Mission & Approach
blocks.hint: Communication, independence, wellbeing, and why structure matters in practice.

blocks.title: The Difference We Make
blocks.hint: Meaningful participation, positive experiences, families, and long term impact.

blocks.title: Key Partners & Suppliers
blocks.hint: Collaboration, venues, resources, and consistency across services.

modules.recap_intro: A quick recap of what defines clubSENsational and how our mission shapes everyday practice.

recap_ideas.title: Our values shape every interaction
recap_ideas.text: How we show up influences trust, safety and belonging for every participant.

recap_ideas.title: Mission guides daily decisions
recap_ideas.text: Purpose turns into practice through consistent choices in sessions and support.

recap_ideas.title: Structure builds reliable experiences
recap_ideas.text: Predictable routines help participants engage with confidence.

recap_ideas.title: Impact extends beyond the session
recap_ideas.text: Positive participation supports families, confidence and long term wellbeing.

recap_ideas.title: Partners strengthen our delivery
recap_ideas.text: Collaboration across venues and suppliers keeps provision consistent.

recap_ideas.title: Professional standards protect everyone
recap_ideas.text: Shared expectations help staff represent clubSENsational with care.

modules.title: Team & Departments
modules.subtitle: How we are organised and who does what across the organisation.
modules.descriptor: Understand structure, leadership and how teams connect before you open the blocks.
modules.intro: Understand our structure, key departments and how teams work together to deliver consistent provision.
outcomes: Who leads the organisation and how decisions flow
What core operational departments do
How service delivery teams fit together
Who to contact for support in each area

blocks.title: Management Team & Leadership
blocks.hint: Leadership, safeguarding, recruitment, and maintaining quality across services.

blocks.title: Core Operational Departments
blocks.hint: Administration, finance, human resources, and operational systems behind service delivery.

blocks.title: Service Delivery Teams
blocks.hint: Instructors, positive experiences, adapting support, and collaboration across services.

blocks.title: Working Together Across the Organisation
blocks.hint: Shared purpose, communication, consistency across venues, and collaboration for better outcomes.

modules.recap_intro: A quick recap of how teams connect across clubSENsational and who to turn to for support.

recap_ideas.title: Clear structure supports accountability
recap_ideas.text: Knowing roles and reporting lines helps decisions move quickly and safely.

recap_ideas.title: Leadership sets organisational tone
recap_ideas.text: Management expectations influence quality, safeguarding and culture.

recap_ideas.title: Operations enable reliable delivery
recap_ideas.text: Administration, finance and HR systems keep services running smoothly.

recap_ideas.title: Service teams shape participant experience
recap_ideas.text: Frontline staff turn policy and planning into daily practice.

recap_ideas.title: Communication should cross departments
recap_ideas.text: Shared information prevents gaps when needs change or escalate.

recap_ideas.title: Collaboration improves outcomes
recap_ideas.text: Working together across teams supports safer, more consistent provision.

modules.title: Services & Venues
modules.subtitle: What we deliver and where our provision takes place.
modules.descriptor: Explore our services, venues and operational expectations before you open the blocks.
modules.intro: clubSENsational delivers support across multiple services, venues and environments. This module explores how services operate, how environments influence participation, and why consistency and adaptation remain essential.
outcomes: Understand the different services delivered by clubSENsational
Recognise how environments influence participation and support
Understand why adaptation across venues is important
Identify how consistency and professional practice are maintained across services

blocks.title: Understanding Our Services
blocks.hint: Aquatic, physical activity, community support, and shared principles across services.

blocks.title: Aquatic, Physical & Community Environments
blocks.hint: How different environments shape participation and support.

blocks.title: Adapting Support Across Different Venues
blocks.hint: Flexibility and preparation when moving between venues.

blocks.title: Consistency, Safety & Professional Practice Across Services
blocks.hint: Maintaining quality and safe practice everywhere we deliver.

modules.recap_intro: A quick recap of how services and venues shape participation, adaptation and safe practice.

recap_ideas.title: Every environment changes participation
recap_ideas.text: Aquatic, physical and community settings each bring different needs and risks.

recap_ideas.title: Services share core principles
recap_ideas.text: Structure, dignity and person centred support apply across all provision.

recap_ideas.title: Adaptation is operational, not optional
recap_ideas.text: Prepare support before arrival so transitions between venues stay smooth.

recap_ideas.title: Consistency protects quality
recap_ideas.text: Shared routines and standards help families know what to expect.

recap_ideas.title: Safety follows you between venues
recap_ideas.text: Supervision, environment checks and professional conduct remain essential everywhere.

recap_ideas.title: Professional practice travels with you
recap_ideas.text: Represent clubSENsational the same way in every service and location.

modules.title: Our Clients & Approach
modules.subtitle: Who we support and how we deliver person-centred practice.
modules.descriptor: Explore who we support, how needs influence participation, and why adaptable support remains essential.
modules.intro: At clubSENsational, every individual presents different strengths, communication styles, support needs and ways of experiencing the world. This module explores who we support and why person centred, structured and adaptable support remains essential.
outcomes: Understand the different individuals and needs supported by clubSENsational
Recognise how communication, sensory and emotional differences may influence participation
Understand the importance of person centred and adaptable support
Identify how structure, regulation and consistency support positive experiences

blocks.title: Understanding Our Clients
blocks.hint: Neurodiversity, communication, sensory responses, and strength based support.

blocks.title: Understanding Behaviour, Regulation & Participation
blocks.hint: Behaviour as communication, regulation, readiness, and co regulation.

blocks.title: Our Support Approach
blocks.hint: Person centred support, structure, visual systems, and gradual progression.

blocks.title: Creating Positive & Meaningful Experiences
blocks.hint: Confidence, emotional safety, meaningful participation, and family wellbeing.

modules.recap_intro: A quick recap of person centred support, regulation and creating meaningful participant experiences.

recap_ideas.title: Every participant is individual
recap_ideas.text: Strengths, communication and sensory needs should guide how you support.

recap_ideas.title: Behaviour communicates need
recap_ideas.text: Pause, observe and respond before escalating demands or instruction.

recap_ideas.title: Regulation enables participation
recap_ideas.text: Readiness and co regulation matter as much as activity plans.

recap_ideas.title: Person centred beats one size fits all
recap_ideas.text: Adapt structure, visuals and pace to the person in front of you.

recap_ideas.title: Emotional safety builds confidence
recap_ideas.text: Predictability and respect help engagement grow over time.

recap_ideas.title: Families are part of the picture
recap_ideas.text: Positive experiences support trust, wellbeing and continuity beyond sessions.

modules.title: Your Role at clubSENsational
modules.subtitle: Expectations, conduct and professional standards for your role.
modules.descriptor: Explore responsibilities, professionalism and how your daily practice supports safe, person centred services.
modules.intro: Every staff member plays an important role in creating safe, structured and meaningful experiences. This module explores responsibilities, expectations and professional behaviours required across all clubSENsational services.
outcomes: Understand the responsibilities and expectations of your role
Recognise the importance of professionalism, preparation and consistency
Understand how staff behaviour influences participant experiences
Identify how communication, teamwork and organisational systems support safe service delivery

blocks.title: Professionalism & Expectations
blocks.hint: Professional conduct, reliability, positive interaction, and shared standards.

blocks.title: Preparing & Delivering Sessions
blocks.hint: Session preparation, delivery, and maintaining safe practice.

blocks.title: Communication, Teamwork & Accountability
blocks.hint: Team communication, collaboration, and professional accountability.

blocks.title: Representing clubSENsational in Practice
blocks.hint: How staff represent the organisation in daily practice.

modules.recap_intro: A quick recap of professionalism, preparation and how your daily practice shapes participant experiences.

recap_ideas.title: Professionalism influences every experience
recap_ideas.text: Conduct, reliability and attitude set the tone before teaching begins.

recap_ideas.title: Preparation supports safer delivery
recap_ideas.text: Plan resources, environment and support needs before participants arrive.

recap_ideas.title: Consistency builds trust
recap_ideas.text: Predictable routines help participants engage with confidence.

recap_ideas.title: Communication should adapt to needs
recap_ideas.text: Clear, respectful interaction supports understanding and cooperation.

recap_ideas.title: Teamwork protects quality
recap_ideas.text: Share information, escalate concerns and support colleagues openly.

recap_ideas.title: You represent the organisation daily
recap_ideas.text: How you act in sessions shapes reputation, safety and participant wellbeing.

modules.title: Policies & Protection
modules.subtitle: Safeguarding, safety, reporting systems and policies that protect participants across all services.
modules.descriptor: Understand the policies, procedures and operational responsibilities that support safety, safeguarding and participant protection.
modules.intro: Safe, ethical and professional practice forms the foundation of every clubSENsational service and environment. This module introduces key policies, procedures and operational responsibilities that help protect participants, families, staff and the wider organisation.
outcomes: Understand safeguarding, safety and participant protection responsibilities
Recognise the importance of professional conduct, confidentiality and ethical practice
Understand how reporting systems and procedures support safe services
Identify how policies connect to real operational practice across environments

blocks.title: Safety & Safeguarding
blocks.hint: Safeguarding, safe environments, supervision and emergency response.

blocks.title: Respect, Ethics & Professional Boundaries
blocks.hint: Conduct, dignity, ethics and professional boundaries in practice.

blocks.title: Reporting, Confidentiality & Data Protection
blocks.hint: Reporting systems, confidentiality and data protection responsibilities.

blocks.title: Policies in Everyday Practice
blocks.hint: How policies connect to daily operational practice across services.

modules.recap_intro: A quick recap of safeguarding, ethics, reporting and how policies guide everyday professional decisions.

recap_ideas.title: Safeguarding is everyone's responsibility
recap_ideas.text: Stay alert, act early and follow procedures when something feels wrong.

recap_ideas.title: Safety starts with the environment
recap_ideas.text: Supervision, risk awareness and emergency readiness protect participants.

recap_ideas.title: Boundaries protect trust
recap_ideas.text: Respect, dignity and ethical conduct keep relationships professional.

recap_ideas.title: Report concerns without delay
recap_ideas.text: Use agreed channels so issues are recorded and handled properly.

recap_ideas.title: Confidentiality requires care
recap_ideas.text: Share information only with people who need it for safe support.

recap_ideas.title: Policies guide daily decisions
recap_ideas.text: Translate procedures into practice during sessions, travel and communication.
